description_long: This object consists of a clustered group of six wooden barrels of varying sizes, some upright and some lying on their sides, arranged around a pile of irregularly shaped gray rocks. One of the barrels is tipped over, revealing a wooden end with a metal rim. A medieval-style sword with a gold crossguard and red-tipped hilt is embedded in the rocks at the center of the arrangement. The barrels are reinforced with dark metal hoops and have a slightly stylized, low-poly appearance. The wood is dark brown with visible plank divisions, and the metal bands are a muted gray. The overall scene suggests a storage or supply area, possibly in a medieval or fantasy urban setting.
description: A group of six wooden barrels with metal hoops, clustered around gray rocks with a sword embedded in the center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sword embedded in rocks, surrounded by barrels of different sizes, with one barrel lying on its side facing forward.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the tops of the barrels and the arrangement of the group, with the sword partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the upright barrels, with the sword hilt and a barrel end partially visible behind.
description_view_3: Back angled view showing the tops and sides of the barrels, the rocks, and the rear of the tipped-over barrel.
